title: jurinea amplexicaulis
intro: Jurinea amplexicaulis, also known as Mongolian thistle or Jurinée, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Jurinea amplexicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used topically in the form of salves or creams.
